name: Urgent buyer
desc: Needs it solved now, price secondary
visualCue: person reacting to a problem — hands on head, looking at damage, on the phone

name: Price buyer
visualCue: person on phone or laptop comparing options, looking at a screen with numbers

name: Project buyer
visualCue: person with blueprints, planning documents, or walking through a space imagining changes

name: Repeat buyer
scriptHook: wants someone they can trust every time
visualCue: handshake, familiar interaction, returning customer energy

name: Preventative buyer
visualCue: person inspecting something carefully, checking, maintaining

name: First-timer
desc: Never bought this before, needs guidance
scriptHook: doing this for the first time
visualCue: person looking confused or overwhelmed, searching on phone, reading reviews

name: Lifestyle buyer
desc: Buying identity, not just a service
scriptHook: buying who they want to be
visualCue: confident person in aspirational setting, showing result or transformation

name: Investor buyer
scriptHook: focused on return, not just the service
visualCue: person reviewing documents or data, business context, property or financial setting

name: Referral buyer
desc: Came from word of mouth, trust already high
visualCue: two people talking, one recommending to the other, word-of-mouth energy

name: Luxury buyer
desc: Wants the premium option, price signals quality
scriptHook: wants the best — not the cheapest
visualCue: premium environment, upscale aesthetic, person in high-end setting

name: Skeptic buyer
scriptHook: been burned before and is very careful
visualCue: person with skeptical expression, reading reviews or asking hard questions

name: DIY-to-pro buyer
desc: Tried to DIY it, now calling a pro
scriptHook: tried to do it themselves — now they need help
emotionalState: defeated, relieved to ask for help
visualCue: person looking at a failed DIY attempt, tools on the ground, calling someone

name: Corporate buyer
desc: Buying for a business, needs process and invoicing
scriptHook: buying for a business, not themselves
visualCue: office setting, person in business attire reviewing a proposal or contract

name: Gift buyer
scriptHook: buying this as a gift for someone they care about
emotionalState: caring, slightly uncertain about the recipient's preferences
visualCue: person wrapping something, presenting a gift, buying for someone else

name: Comeback buyer
desc: Lapsed customer returning after a gap
scriptHook: coming back after trying somewhere else
visualCue: person returning to a familiar place, reunion energy
